known_values.description: DESCRIPTION: Breathing Fire erupts brocade crowns, white glitter, and silver chrysanthemums - simple, fierce, dragon-level heat.

candidate_records.identity_check: strong product identity via name+brand+known category

candidate_records.value: Create a hot show with Breathing Fire! Nine shots of alternating aerial effects produce colorful, loud explosions of brocades, comet tails and crackle shots to create a dazzling spectacle for your audience. You will be stunned by all this goodness in a small package!
candidate_records.identity_check: strong product identity via name+brand+known category
